title: CauldronFix
description: Makes cauldron even better for Mojang!
body:
# Description
CauldronsFix adds a more refined cauldron system to Minecraft.
# Blocks Overview
(All images taken with isorender)
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8699247932eaefe579351b3e3ccb9828fbf4757f.png)
## Cauldrons containing solids

![Cauldron Full Of Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67e5c393e6ac562fbdebb38b0d0ae682d26ff8f.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Full Of Obsidian</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Tool: >= Diamond pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Obsidian(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron Full Of Obsidian
    
    Explosion: Caudron(Leave obsidian in place)
  </details>
  
  Produced when water appears above a lava cauldron

  Craft recipe: Obsidian + Cauldron (shapeless)

  Immovable

  Gravity-affected block

  Redstone Comparator output:30
</details>

![Cauldron Full Of Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e387e19fd1f0556daefa43cba76004970340a1d3.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Full Of Stone</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Can interact with Mace

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Stone(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron Full Of Stone
    
    Explosion: Caudron & Stone
  </details>
  
  Produced when lava appears above a level3 water cauldron

  Craft recipe: Stone + Cauldron (shapeless)

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output:15
</details>

![Cauldron Full Of Cobblestones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa8253583f49c672d6ab21af29598fccb3a2885.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Full Of Cobblestones</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Can interact with Mace

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Cobblestone(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron Full Of Cobblestones
    
    Explosion: Caudron & Cobblestone
  </details>
  
  Produced when lava appears above a level2 water cauldron

  Craft recipe: Cobblestone + Cauldron (shapeless)

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output:10
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/155b270053a289364393906983b793562a861844.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Half Full Of Cobblestones</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Cobblestone Slab(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron HAlf Full Of Cobblestones
    
    Explosion: Caudron & Cobblestone Slab
  </details>
  
  Produced when lava appears above a level1 water cauldron

  Craft recipe: -

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output:5
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c043f7ba8590ddf77cb074b78385f6d16c9a63fc.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Full Of Gravel</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Can interact with Mace
  
  Can interact with Shovel like items

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Gravel(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron Full Of Gravel
    
    Explosion: Caudron & Gravel
  </details>
  
  Produced when interact with **Cauldron Full Of Cobblestones** using Mace

  Recipe: Cauldron Full Of Gravel -> Gravel x2

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output:3
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309079b3b983398eb8242ebe3ee4d2ff7214338e.png)
<details>
<summary>Cauldron Full Of Burnt</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

  Can interact with Shovel like items

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Coal(Leave empty cauldron in place)
    
    Silk_touch: A Cauldron Full Of Burnt
    
    Explosion: Caudron & Coal
  </details>
  
  Produced when lava appears above Milk Cauldron/Honey Cauldron

  Recipe: Cauldron Full Of Gravel -> Gravel x2

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output:6
</details>

## Cauldrons containing liquids

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e39539df50f1c2b1050c2a4e9a3c12afe4cda7.png)
<details>
<summary>Honey Cauldron</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes(Irritate near by bees)

 

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Cauldron
    
    Silk_touch: Cauldron
    
    Explosion: Caudron
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Effects when standing inside</summary>
    
    Slowness III(00:05)
    
    Regeneration III(00:05)
    
    Haste III(00:05)

    Saturation III(00:05)
  </details>

  Movable

  Redstone Comparator output: Level(1~3)
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2247ebcf561c67726fa5ceb0750dda8ace7328cb.png)
<details>
<summary>Dragons breath Cauldron</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes(Summon dragon's breath effect cloud)

 

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Cauldron
    
    Silk_touch: Cauldron
    
    Explosion: Caudron
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Effects when standing inside</summary>
    
    Speed VI(00:05)
    
    Haste IV(00:05)
    
    Jump Boost III(00:05)

    Strength VI(00:05)

    Damage: 1heart/tick(All entities)
    
  </details>

  Movable

  Explodes when there is lava above

  Summon dragon's breath effect cloud when there is water above
  
  Redstone Comparator output: Level(1~3) x 4
</details>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d137ef854f1216706558414cc3558fb2a78224b.png)
<details>
<summary>Milk Cauldron</summary>
  
  Minable:Yes

 

  Tool: >= Wooden pickaxe
  <details>
  <summary>Drops</summary>
    
    Normal: Cauldron
    
    Silk_touch: Cauldron
    
    Explosion: Caudron
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Remove effects when standing inside</summary>
    
    Poisen

    Wither

    Weakness
    
  </details>

  Movable
  
  Redstone Comparator output: 1
</details>

# Other changes
- Now the dispenser can interact with cauldrons
  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cef58e8b9a56dc2d3f38d848a28e09196bf6589.gif)
